title: 10 best herbal tinctures for fungal infection
description: Kava tinctures helps with fungal infection because they contain a unique combination of compounds that exhibit antifungal properties. The kavalactones present in kava tinctures have been shown to inhibit the growth and reproduction of fungi, thereby helping to treat infections such as athlete's foot, ringworm, and Candida overgrowth. Additionally, kava tinctures' anti-inflammatory effects can help soothe irritated skin and promote healing. By addressing the root cause of fungal infecti...
